commit.message:
Remove Supabase realtime subscriptions from hub frontend

Hub backend now uses Go with SSE via LISTEN/NOTIFY instead of Supabase
realtime. Remove the three realtime channel subscriptions (DM conversations,
DM messages, DM notifications) that were causing WebSocket errors since
there's no realtime server. DMs still update via polling (refetchInterval).
Push notifications are handled server-side by the Go push listener.

commit.message:
fix: use exec < /dev/tty instead of re-exec workaround

Simpler and more reliable than the temp file re-exec approach.
exec < /dev/tty reassigns stdin to the terminal for the rest of the
script, so read prompts work correctly even when piped via curl | bash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: add response cache + smart polling for ~200+ concurrent users

- New middleware/cache.js: in-memory Map cache with TTL, prefix-based
  invalidation, and periodic cleanup (same pattern as auth.js userCache)
- Stats endpoints (7 routes): 60s cache — cuts 2-10 parallel DB queries
  per request down to 1 cache lookup
- Figure endpoints (5 routes): 15-30s cache on read, auto-invalidation
  on all writes (submissions, market transactions, comments, admin ops)
- Smart polling: browser visibility API pauses all polling when tab is
  hidden, resumes with immediate catch-up when tab becomes active
- Chat polling: 3s → 5s with background tab guard
- Cache invalidated automatically on all POST/PUT/DELETE mutations

commit.message:
Accordion card redesign for Vessel, Homies & Copplings, and Guiding Stars tabs

Convert 132 narrow grid cards to full-width horizontal accordion cards across
Vessel (Ship Layout, Life Aboard, The Harvest), Extended Family (all 5 Homie
families + Copplings), and Guiding Stars (all 4 constellations). Vanguard and
static panels preserved unchanged.

- Add accordion CSS with gold accents, chevron rotation, smooth max-height transitions
- Add toggleAccordionCard() JS for one-open-at-a-time per group behavior
- Rename sidebar link "Extended Family" → "Homies & Copplings"
- Add pixel-art Claude spirit icon (3-legged, blocky orange #E07A3A) in sidebar footer
- Zero content deleted — all original text preserved

commit.message:
fix(button): inner button fills host element (#43) (#51)

* fix(button): make inner button fill host element for full click area

Moves padding from the host element to the inner <button> so clicks
anywhere on the visible button surface trigger native button behavior
including form submission. Size variant padding also targets the inner button.

Closes #43

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(button): remove redundant CSS declarations after all: inherit

Remove cursor: inherit, font: inherit, and color: inherit from inner
button rule — all: inherit already sets these properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix iOS PWA gap at bottom: use 100dvh instead of 100%/100vh

On iOS standalone mode (Add to Home Screen), 100% height and 100vh don't
reliably fill the viewport past the home indicator. Switch to 100dvh
(dynamic viewport height) which correctly covers the full screen. Also
use explicit top/left instead of inset for broader compatibility.

commit.message:
v3.6: Remove RSI reversal entries, keep agreement-only

RSI reversal entries (buy at RSI<25, sell at RSI>75) removed.
Data: 25% WR, -$65 over 8 trades. RSI extremes on 1m candles
indicate strong trend, not reversal.

Agreement entries (SMC+Tech aligned) kept as sole entry path:
53% WR, +$139 over 17 trades.

RSI VETO still active (oversold blocks sells, overbought blocks
buys) — only the entry trigger is removed.

Full 17-language translation system with credits and accessibility

commit.message:
fix: remove runtime hook to prevent double glob patching recursion

Both the runtime hook and newsnet_main.py were patching glob.glob,
causing infinite recursion when the second patch's fallback called the
first patch which called itself. Only newsnet_main.py's patch is needed
since it runs before any RNS imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix group bot: respond to empty mentions and unauthed users

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Rail Transfer campaign loading on switch days & add EOD Cars field

Two key fixes:

1. Fix campaign loading logic on switch days
   - Bug: if...else if logic skipped loading when day was both loading + switch
   - Fix: Allow loading to happen even on switch days, then apply switch pickup
   - Impact: Thursday now correctly loads cars AND depletes accumulated inventory

2. Add EOD Inventory for Cars to Daily Actuals
   - New section: "5. Rail Transfer EOD (CARS)"
   - Field: "EOD Cars in Transit" (captures ending car count)
   - Stored as type:'eod' with conversion to STn (1 car = 112 STn)
   - Renumbered: Customer Shipments → section 4, Ending Inventory → section 6

Result: Daily Actuals now tracks complete rail transfer data:
- Cars Loaded (daily actuals)
- Cars Picked Up (daily actuals)
- EOD Cars in Transit (inventory snapshot)
